title: Engagement Features - Likes and Comments
description: Implement likes and comments functionality for photos. Build like button with optimistic updates and animation feedback. Create comment section component with real-time comment display, input field, and submission. Display like and comment counts on photo cards. Create API endpoints for like/unlike and CRUD operations on comments. Implement efficient queries for fetching engagement data with photos. Add ability to delete own comments. Show who liked a photo (likers list modal).
